summary: The article discusses the shift from 'Fit to Standard' to 'Fit to Ontology' in AI for enterprise tech, highlighting the importance of ontology-driven AI systems.

Instead, ontology-driven AI systems can provide more accurate and relevant results by understanding the underlying context and relationships.
